_comment: Open building-footprint overlay catalog — Microsoft US Building Footprints (ODbL), per US state, built to PMTiles by scripts/build-overlay-region.sh and hosted on the `building-overlays` GitHub release. The app renders them BENEATH the OSM building layer to fill gaps (suburbs the Microsoft->OSM import never reached). bbox = [S,W,N,E]. url = the legacy minedbuildings host (the old usbuildingdata blob was locked down 2025). Start with the West coast (the maintainer's region); the rest of the 50 states get added like the routing catalog did, incrementally, when someone needs them.
